Senegal Wins 1-0 in Heroic AFCON Final Against Morocco

Jan 22, 2026 • 8JJ Sports

Senegal Wins 1-0 in Heroic AFCON Final Against Morocco

Senegal celebrated a monumental achievement on Tuesday as tens of thousands of jubilant supporters flooded the streets of Dakar to welcome their heroes home following a historic 1-0 Africa Cup of Nations (AFCON) final victory.

The “Lions of Teranga” arrived in the capital to a fever pitch of noise—revving engines, horns, and the iconic roar of vuvuzelas—marking the nation’s second continental title.

You can read the full original article on 8jjsports.com here:
👉 Senegal Wins 1-0 in Heroic AFCON Final Against Morocco
